requirement_topic.en: Noise: No Nigerian Outdoor-Equipment Marking Scheme
requirement_topic.zh: 噪声：尼日利亚无户外设备标识制度
requirement_topic.zht: 噪聲：奈及利亞無戶外設備標識制度

summary.en: Nigeria does not operate an equivalent of the EU outdoor-noise marking scheme, so there is no mandatory guaranteed sound-power level marking on the tool as a pre-clearance condition under SONCAP for power tools. Noise is treated mainly through general workplace and environmental noise rules rather than a product-level marking obligation; any noise-related test data accepted under SONCAP would follow the NIS-adopted IEC 62841 measurement clauses, not an outdoor-noise directive. Exporters should not copy an EU outdoor-noise label onto Nigeria-bound product as if it were a Nigerian requirement.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚没有等同于欧盟户外噪声标识的制度，因此 SONCAP 下电动工具清关前并无强制的保证声功率级标识。噪声主要通过一般职业和环境噪声规则处理，而非产品级标识义务；SONCAP 下若接受任何噪声相关测试数据，将遵循 NIS 采纳的 IEC 62841 测量条款，而非户外噪声指令。出口商不应把欧盟户外噪声标签照搬到运往尼日利亚的产品上当作尼日利亚要求。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞沒有等同於歐盟戶外噪聲標識的制度，因此 SONCAP 下電動工具清關前並無強制的保證聲功率級標識。噪聲主要透過一般職業和環境噪聲規則處理，而非產品級標識義務；SONCAP 下若接受任何噪聲相關測試數據，將遵循 NIS 採納的 IEC 62841 測量條款，而非戶外噪聲指令。出口商不應把歐盟戶外噪聲標籤照搬到運往奈及利亞的產品上當作奈及利亞要求。

standards_or_laws: No Nigerian equivalent to EU Directive 2000/14/EC outdoor-noise marking for power tools
NIS IEC 62841 series measurement clauses for declared noise emission values
General Nigerian workplace and environmental noise regulations (not a product marking scheme)

summary.en: China GB/T 3883 evidence focuses on electrical and mechanical safety and includes noise emission declaration clauses adopted from IEC 62841 rather than an EU-style outdoor-noise marking. This aligns reasonably with Nigeria, where no separate outdoor-noise marking applies.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 3883 证据侧重电气和机械安全，并包含采纳自 IEC 62841 的噪声排放声明条款，而非欧盟式户外噪声标识。这与不另设户外噪声标识的尼日利亚情况大致相符。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 3883 證據側重電氣和機械安全，並包含採納自 IEC 62841 的噪聲排放聲明條款，而非歐盟式戶外噪聲標識。這與不另設戶外噪聲標識的奈及利亞情況大致相符。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series noise emission declaration clauses
China domestic noise standards where applicable

gap.en: The honest position is that there is no Nigerian outdoor-noise marking gap to close for SONCAP clearance. The real action is to avoid over-engineering an EU outdoor-noise label and instead ensure declared noise values follow the NIS IEC 62841 clauses in the instructions, while observing any local workplace and environmental noise rules in use.
gap.zh: 诚实的结论是 SONCAP 清关并不存在需要弥补的尼日利亚户外噪声标识差距。真正要做的是避免过度套用欧盟户外噪声标签，而是确保说明书中的声明噪声值遵循 NIS IEC 62841 条款，并遵守使用环境中适用的当地职业和环境噪声规则。
gap.zht: 誠實的結論是 SONCAP 清關並不存在需要彌補的奈及利亞戶外噪聲標識差距。真正要做的是避免過度套用歐盟戶外噪聲標籤，而是確保說明書中的聲明噪聲值遵循 NIS IEC 62841 條款，並遵守使用環境中適用的當地職業和環境噪聲規則。

target.en: Not a standalone mandatory product-marking obligation: Nigeria has no outdoor-noise marking scheme for power tools. Declared noise values follow the NIS IEC 62841 basis; general noise rules are environmental, not product certification.
target.zh: 并非独立强制产品标识义务：尼日利亚对电动工具无户外噪声标识制度。声明噪声值遵循 NIS IEC 62841 依据；一般噪声规则属环境管理，而非产品认证。
target.zht: 並非獨立強制產品標識義務：奈及利亞對電動工具無戶外噪聲標識制度。聲明噪聲值遵循 NIS IEC 62841 依據；一般噪聲規則屬環境管理，而非產品認證。

cn.en: China GB/T 3883 includes noise emission declaration clauses but no EU-style outdoor-noise marking, which broadly matches the Nigerian position.
cn.zh: 中国 GB/T 3883 含噪声排放声明条款但无欧盟式户外噪声标识，与尼日利亚情况大致相符。
cn.zht: 中國 GB/T 3883 含噪聲排放聲明條款但無歐盟式戶外噪聲標識，與奈及利亞情況大致相符。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No Nigerian outdoor-noise marking applies to power tools, so this is largely a non-gap for SONCAP. Keep declared noise values on the NIS IEC 62841 basis and do not present an EU outdoor-noise label as a Nigerian requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚对电动工具不适用户外噪声标识，故就 SONCAP 而言基本无差距。声明噪声值保持在 NIS IEC 62841 依据上，且不要把欧盟户外噪声标签当作尼日利亚要求列示。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奈及利亞對電動工具不適用戶外噪聲標識，故就 SONCAP 而言基本無差距。聲明噪聲值保持在 NIS IEC 62841 依據上，且不要把歐盟戶外噪聲標籤當作奈及利亞要求列示。
